template.name: Company Culture & Onboarding
template.description: A premium 5-slide orientation deck in a Mint & Forest theme, complete with department cards, milestone timelines, and split benefit tiles.

scenes.title: Company Culture
scenes.description: Elegant dark cover with forest green gradients, metadata labels, and asymmetrical curved team photo.

clips.content: Welcome to your journey. Learn about our mission, values, team, and benefits as we build the future together.

scenes.title: Mission & Values
scenes.description: Mint-tinted slide showcasing three card columns of core business behaviors.

clips.content: We are committed to fostering an inclusive, collaborative, and forward-thinking environment where every individual has the power to grow and innovate.
We do the right thing, always. Transparency and honesty are the foundation of our work.
We challenge status quo, embrace change, and push the boundaries of what is possible.
We support each other, value diverse perspectives, and win as a single united team.

scenes.title: Our Team
scenes.description: Clean split grid layout presenting department columns with rounded profile images.

clips.content: We believe in empowerment, clear alignment, and cross-functional support across all teams.
Building robust platforms, scalable tools, and clean architectures.
Crafting seamless user flows, beautiful interfaces, and blueprints.
Driving brand engagement, growth strategies, and supporting customers.

scenes.title: Onboarding Timeline
scenes.description: Step-by-step horizontal milestone graph detail for the first quarter.

clips.content: Configure your setup, connect accounts, and meet your manager.
Attend deep-dive roadmap reviews and align on immediate tasks.
Take ownership of your first shipment, campaign, or code release.
Own core metrics, direct strategies, and guide incoming teammates.

scenes.title: Benefits & Perks
scenes.description: Split layout detailing flexible work dark panel on the left and mint detail boxes on the right.

clips.content: We take care of our people so we can grow together sustainably.
Work from anywhere, anytime. We prioritize trust, outcomes, and clear communication over hours.
Comprehensive premium medical plan, annual wellness stipends, and subsidized gym memberships.
Dedicated annual education budget, access to online learning platforms, and sponsored conference travel.
